item.title: Visiting Canada’s First McDonald’s Location
item.description: A visit to the first McDonald’s location in Canada, built in 1967, exploring its history, design, and role in the early expansion of the brand in the country.

media:content.media:title: Visiting Canada’s First McDonald’s Location
media:content.media:description: A visit to the first McDonald’s location in Canada, built in 1967, exploring its history, design, and role in the early expansion of the brand in the country.

item.title: Winter Van Camping Without a Heater
item.description: KBDProductionsTV shares a winter van camping challenge without using a heater.

media:content.media:title: Winter Van Camping Without a Heater
media:content.media:description: KBDProductionsTV shares a winter van camping challenge without using a heater.

item.title: Inside Meliá Varadero Hotel in Cuba
item.description: A walkthrough of Meliá Varadero, highlighting its beachfront location, amenities, rooms, dining options, and overall guest experience in Varadero.

media:content.media:title: Inside Meliá Varadero Hotel in Cuba
media:content.media:description: A walkthrough of Meliá Varadero, highlighting its beachfront location, amenities, rooms, dining options, and overall guest experience in Varadero.

item.title: Stealth Camping in a Parking Lot at -7°
item.description: A stealth camping experience in a parking lot at -7°C, testing outdoor survival gear and endurance through a cold winter night in urban conditions.

media:content.media:title: Stealth Camping in a Parking Lot at -7°
media:content.media:description: A stealth camping experience in a parking lot at -7°C, testing outdoor survival gear and endurance through a cold winter night in urban conditions.

item.title: Exploring Toronto’s Underground Shopping Complex
item.description: Explore Toronto’s PATH, the world’s largest underground shopping network, spending 24 hours navigating shops, food spots, and connected city walkways below downtown.

media:content.media:title: Exploring Toronto’s Underground Shopping Complex
media:content.media:description: Explore Toronto’s PATH, the world’s largest underground shopping network, spending 24 hours navigating shops, food spots, and connected city walkways below downtown.

item.title: Gotham Steakhouse in Vancouver
item.description: Explore Gotham Steakhouse & Cocktail Bar in Vancouver, known for its refined steak cuts, classic atmosphere, and carefully crafted cocktails in a downtown setting.

media:content.media:title: Gotham Steakhouse in Vancouver
media:content.media:description: Explore Gotham Steakhouse & Cocktail Bar in Vancouver, known for its refined steak cuts, classic atmosphere, and carefully crafted cocktails in a downtown setting.
